text.title: A/B Testing Implementation Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is there a managed platform with an analyzer, or do we own plumbing?

branch.when: platform == optimizely OR growthbook OR statsig

conclusion.verdict: use the platform's analyzer; do not reimplement
use manual SQL; plumbing is overkill
build typed event + tracker + analyzer + reporter

text.example: Synthetic: control 1000/10000=10%, treatment 1200/10000=12% → z≈4.6 → p<0.001 → lift_abs=2pp, lift_rel=20% → Wilson CIs not overlapping → guardrail latency flat → ship.
